languages.text: "Вы там, в Клети, помогли нам, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}себя показали достойно{/d}. Думаю, дядька поверил, что у вас есть шанс победить тварь. Ну и зауважал маленько, видимо".

"You did right by us in the Cage and {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}showed what you're made of{/d}. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."
languages.original_text: "Вы там, в Клети, помогли нам, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}себя показали достойно{/d}. Думаю, дядька поверил, что у вас есть шанс победить тварь. Ну и зауважал маленько, видимо".

traits.locale_text: "You did right by us in the Cage and {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}showed what you're made of{/d}. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."
"You did right by us in the Cage and showed what you're made of. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Izdrig isn't a heartless scumbag, even if you think he is. He's a good man and a commander who cares about his soldiers. You proved you were worthy of respect back in Tsar-Cage. I think Izdrig believed you had a chance of winning. But then not helping you to do it — that's where the scumminess comes in."
"You did right by us in the Cage and showed what you're made of. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."
"You did right by us in the Cage and showed what you're made of. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."

languages.text: 「貴方の御心は、イズドリーグは冷酷な悪党だと思っているかもしれません。でも、彼は良い人であり、兵士のことを気にかけている指揮官です。あなたはツァー・ケージで、尊敬に値する人物であることを証明しました。イズドリーグは、貴方が勝つ可能性があると考えていたと思います。でも、そのために手を差し伸べなかったのです。それが悪党の所業なのです。」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, Izdrig isn't a heartless scumbag, even if you think he is. He's a good man and a commander who cares about his soldiers. You proved you were worthy of respect back in Tsar-Cage. I think Izdrig believed you had a chance of winning. But then not helping you to do it — that's where the scumminess comes in."

traits.locale_text: 「貴方（御方）の御心は、イズドリーグは冷酷な悪党だと思っているかもしれません。でも、彼は良い人であり、兵士のことを気にかけている指揮官です。あなたはツァー・ケージで、尊敬に値する人物であることを証明しました。イズドリーグは、貴方が勝つ可能性があると考えていたと思います。でも、そのために手を差し伸べなかったのです。それが悪党の所業なのです。」

languages.text: "Kafes'te bize yanlış yapmadınız, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}nasıl biri olduğunuzu gösterdiniz{/d}. Sanırım ihtiyar, o yaratığa karşı gerçekten bir şansınız olduğuna inanıyor. Saygısını kazanmış olabilirsiniz."
languages.original_text: "You did right by us in the Cage and {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}showed what you're made of{/d}. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."

traits.locale_text: "Kafes'te bize yanlış yapmadınız, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}nasıl biri olduğunuzu gösterdiniz{/d}. Sanırım ihtiyar, o yaratığa karşı gerçekten bir şansınız olduğuna inanıyor. Saygısını kazanmış olabilirsiniz."

languages.text: «Nos trató bien en la Jaula y {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}demostró de qué pasta está hech{/d}{mf|o|a}. Seguro que el viejo cree que tiene usted posibilidades de vencer a la criatura. Debe de haberse ganado su respeto».
languages.original_text: "You did right by us in the Cage and {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}showed what you're made of{/d}. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."

traits.locale_text: «Nos trató bien en la Jaula y {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}demostró de qué pasta está hech{/d}{mf|o|a}. Seguro que el viejo cree que tiene usted posibilidades de vencer a la criatura. Debe de haberse ganado su respeto».

languages.text: “您在牢笼待我们不薄，也{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}证明了自己的本事{/d}。我猜那个老家伙是觉得，您或许真有机会干掉那怪物。想必您已经赢得了他的一点尊重。”
languages.original_text: "You did right by us in the Cage and {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}showed what you're made of{/d}. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."

traits.locale_text: “您在牢笼待我们不薄，也{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}证明了自己的本事{/d}。我猜那个老家伙是觉得，您或许真有机会干掉那怪物。想必您已经赢得了他的一点尊重。”

languages.text: « Parce que vous nous avez {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}montré ce que vous valez{/d} en nous apportant votre aide dans la Cage. Le vieux Batoshski a l'air de penser que vous avez une chance réelle de tuer cette créature. Il faut croire que vous avez réussi à gagner un peu de son respect. »
languages.original_text: "You did right by us in the Cage and {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}showed what you're made of{/d}. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."

traits.locale_text: « Parce que vous nous avez {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}montré ce que vous valez{/d} en nous apportant votre aide dans la Cage. Le vieux Batoshski a l'air de penser que vous avez une chance réelle de tuer cette créature. Il faut croire que vous avez réussi à gagner un peu de son respect. »

languages.text: "Ihr habt Euch uns gegenüber im Käfig anständig verhalten und gezeigt, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}aus welchem Holz Ihr geschnitzt seid{/d}. Ich schätze, der alte Mann glaubt, dass Ihr gegen die Kreatur tatsächlich eine Chance habt. Ihr habt Euch offenbar seinen Respekt verdient."
languages.original_text: "You did right by us in the Cage and {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_AdvicesToJanur}showed what you're made of{/d}. I reckon the old man believes you actually stand a chance against the creature. Must've earned a bit of his respect, I suppose."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt Euch uns gegenüber im Käfig anständig verhalten und gezeigt, aus welchem Holz Ihr geschnitzt seid. Ich schätze, der alte Mann glaubt, dass Ihr gegen die Kreatur tatsächlich eine Chance habt. Ihr habt Euch offenbar seinen Respekt verdient."
